resources.string: Please sign in to Google Play Games to view leaderboards.
Please sign in to Google Play Games to view achievements.
Score uploaded to Google Play Games
Could not sign in to Google Play Games. Check that Play Games is installed and you are signed in to a Google account.
Could not open leaderboards. Try again in a moment.
Could not open achievements. Try again in a moment.
Could not upload your score to Google Play Games.
Could not unlock the achievement on Google Play Games.
